# clerk_organization_role (Resource)

Manages a Clerk organization role.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) Unique key for the role (e.g. "internal_admin").
- `name` (String) Display name of the role (e.g. "Internal Admin").

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the role.
- `permissions` (Set of String) Set of permission keys assigned to this role.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the role was created.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the role.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the role was last updated.
